name: Integrated Border Patrol System
description: Comprehensive border security infrastructure combining sensor towers, ground radar, drone patrols, and rapid response teams to detect and interdict illegal crossings and smuggling operations.

specialAbilities.name: Smuggling Interdiction
specialAbilities.description: Sensor fusion detects covert border crossings and smuggling tunnels, reducing arms and contraband flow.

specialAbilities.name: Refugee Flow Management
specialAbilities.description: Controls and processes large refugee movements during crises, preventing destabilizing uncontrolled migration.
